2605.09460.title: When Few Steps Are Enough: Training-Free Acceleration of Identity-Preserved Generation
2605.09460.paper_summary: Identity-preserved image generation is typically built on many-step diffusion backbones, making personalized generation expensive at deployment time. We show that this cost is often unnecessary for identity-conditioned FLUX generation. A frozen InfuseNet identity adapter trained with dev transfers directly to the distilled schnell backbone without retraining. This two-line replacement -- changing the backbone path and disabling classifier-free guidance -- reduces latency by 5.9x while improving ArcFace identity similarity by +0.028 and lpips by -0.016 over the standard 28-step dev baseline. To explain why this works, we analyze the denoising trajectory and find that identity fidelity enters an early effective regime, often within 4-8 steps, while later steps primarily refine visual detail, sharpness, and contrast. Adapter ablations confirm that identity formation depends on the identity adapter, while attention-stream norm probes suggest that the relative conditioning contribution decreases as sampling proceeds. Preliminary style-adapter and object-adapter sweeps on SDXL and SD1.5 show similar diminishing returns after intermediate steps. These results position distilled backbone replacement as a simple, training-free strategy for improving the efficiency-fidelity tradeoff of identity-preserved generation.
2605.09460.paper_summary_zh: 身份保留的影像生成通常基於多步擴散骨幹，這使得個性化生成在部署時成本昂貴。<lb/>我們展示這個成本在身份條件的FLUX生成中通常是不必要的。<lb/>一個冷凍的InfuseNet身份適配器經過訓練後，能夠直接轉移到精煉的schnell骨幹，而無需重新訓練。<lb/>這兩行替換——改變骨幹路徑和禁用無分類器引導——在提高ArcFace身份相似性+0.028和lpips -0.016的同時，將延遲降低了5.9倍，這是相對於標準的28步開發基線。<lb/>為了解釋為什麼這樣有效，我們分析了去噪軌跡，發現身份保真度在早期進入了一個有效的範疇，通常在4-8步內，而後面的步驟主要精煉視覺細節、清晰度和對比度。<lb/>適配器的消融實驗確認身份形成依賴於身份適配器，而注意力流的規範探測則表明，相對的條件貢獻隨著取樣的進行而減少。<lb/>在SDXL和SD1.5上的初步風格適配器和物體適配器掃描顯示，在中間步驟後有類似的收益遞減。<lb/>這些結果將精煉骨幹替換定位為一種簡單的、無需訓練的策略，用於改善身份保留生成的效率與保真度之間的權衡。
2605.09460.author: Dongqi Zheng et.al.
